/usr/bin/clang++-11  -std=c++17 -std=c++17 -g CMakeFiles/data_test.dir/data_test.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data_test.dir/__/src/integrator_custom.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data_test.dir/__/src/dae.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data_test.dir/__/src/data.cpp.o CMakeFiles/data_test.dir/__/src/ocp.cpp.o -o data_test   -L/usr/local/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/lib:/home/marius/cplusplus/build ../libbuildopt.so /home/marius/cplusplus/ocp_cpp/include/matplotplusplus-build/source/matplot/libmatplot.a -lcasadi /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libz.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libpng.so /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenblas.so -lm -ldl /usr/lib/x86_64-linux-gnu/libopenblas.so -lm -ldl /home/marius/cplusplus/ocp_cpp/include/matplotplusplus-build/source/3rd_party/libnodesoup.a
